name: Canonsburg Town Park
description: Come play pickleball at Canonsburg Town Park in Washington, PA! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Iceoplex at Southpointe
description: Iceoplex at Southpointe is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canonsburg, PA. The court surface is hard. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Independence Township Community Center
description: Independence Township Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Avella, PA. There are 3 wood and asphalt courts. 2 are indoors and 1 is outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include food, restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and water. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Must call to schedule court time at 724-507-6448

name: LevelUp Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at LevelUp Pickleball Club in Bridgeville, PA! There are 16 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Mon Valley YMCA
description: Mon Valley YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Monongahela, PA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights, locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: The Brownson House T.S. Fitch Memorial Gymnasium
description: The Brownson House T.S. Fitch Memorial Gymnasium is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Washington, PA. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Thomas Presbyterian Church
description: Come play pickleball at Thomas Presbyterian Church in Eighty Four, PA! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Washington Park Tennis Complex
description: There are also 12 Pickleball courts with lines painted on 6 tennis courts and 4 heavy duty Douglas nets are available for use on tennis courts 5 & 6
open_play_schedule: Club scheduled play is M/W/F/S 8 to 12 on the permanent courts and 4 of the courts on the tennis courts

name: Wilfred R. Cameron Wellness Center
description: Wilfred R. Cameron Wellness Center is a place to play pickleball in Washington, PA. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: W&J College
description: W&J College is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Washington, PA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
